channel.title: mycatalog updates
channel.description: 'My Catalog' uses the IBM Cloud catalog API to retrieve data from the catalog. It attempts to be as accurate as possible. This feed shows additions, updates, removals from the catalog. Use with care. It is a work-in-progress :)

item.title: [added] Sauce Labs Real Device Cloud (sauce-labs-rdc-agent)
item.description: Sauce Labs Real Device Cloud Agent transforms your private device cloud on Sauce Labs into a conversational AI interface

item.title: [updated] TapestryX (l4s-corp-tapestryx) has changed the description of the plan named monthly
item.description: *before*: TapestryX is billed monthly per node at the rate of $2,000., *after*: TapestryX is billed monthly per node at the rate of $3,000.
